time.title: Time
time.description: Current date, time, and timezone checks.

tools.name: get_current_time
tools.when: Use when the answer depends on the current local time or timezone.

web_research.title: Web Research
web_research.description: Public web search, source reading, and time-sensitive verification.

tools.name: search_web
tools.when: Use for a quick first pass when titles, snippets, and URLs are enough.

tools.name: smart_search_web
tools.when: Use for practical, time-sensitive, multi-source, or comparison questions.

tools.name: fetch_content
tools.when: Use after a candidate URL is known and the page body needs verification.

local_files.title: Local Files
local_files.description: Read-only project, prompt, config, and log inspection.

tools.name: list_allowed_roots
tools.when: Use when the assistant needs to know which local roots are readable.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.when: Use to inspect folder structure before reading specific files.

tools.name: search_files
tools.when: Use to find names, settings, functions, errors, or prompt fragments.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.when: Use after a file path is known and text content is needed.

media.title: Media
media.description: Reserved category for image, OCR, audio transcription, and media metadata tools.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Reserved category for searching, proposing, writing, and forgetting long-term memories.

runtime_control.title: Runtime Control
runtime_control.description: Reserved category for launcher/runtime status and controlled restart actions.
